_comment: Wireless standards landscape — watchlist for spec versions and upcoming features.

in_flight_features: Channel Sounding (BT 6.0) — secure ranging via PBR + RTT
LE Audio / Auracast adoption broadening to public venues
standards.infineon_position: AIROC CYW20829 ships Channel Sounding; CYW55513 covers LE Audio. Watch for next-gen 6 GHz parts.

in_flight_features: Wi-Fi 7 MLO mass deployment in routers/clients
AFC (Automated Frequency Coordination) for 6 GHz standard power
Wi-Fi HaLow (802.11ah) growth in long-range IoT
standards.infineon_position: AIROC CYW5557x (Wi-Fi 6E + BT 5.4) competing with Qualcomm/MediaTek/Realtek. No Wi-Fi 7 announced yet — gap vs Synaptics Veros/MediaTek Filogic 380.

in_flight_features: Matter 1.5 — camera streaming, EV chargers, soil moisture, robot vacuums
Aliro (CSA) digital key v2 — NFC + UWB + BLE
standards.infineon_position: AIROC has 802.15.4 in CYW55573; Matter SDK supported. Strong vs NXP IW612 / Silicon Labs MG24 in tri-radio stories.

in_flight_features: Aliro digital key (NFC+UWB+BLE) gaining auto OEM commitments
UWB radar / sensing for presence detection
standards.infineon_position: AIROC has no native UWB; partners with Qorvo. Watch for combo UWB+BLE parts from Qualcomm, NXP (Trimension), Apple, Samsung.
